cues.text: 這個工作是他幫我介紹的
cues.tr: Lesson 11: He introduced me to this job

cues.text: 聽說你換工作了，你現在在做什麼工作？
cues.tr: I heard that you changed your job, what are you doing now?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我現在在一家電腦公司工作。這個工作是他幫我介紹的。
cues.tr: I am now working in a computer company. He introduced me to this job.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 哦，這份工作聽起來不錯！你每天都做些什麼？
cues.tr: Oh, this job sounds good! What do you do every day?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我主要負責管理公司的網站，還有幫客戶解決一些跟電腦有關的問題。
cues.tr: I'm mainly responsible for managing the company's website and helping customers solve some computer-related problems.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 真厲害！這份工作對你來說有挑戰嗎？
cues.tr: That's great! Is this job challenging for you?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 有時候客戶的問題很複雜，需要花時間解決，不過我喜歡這樣的挑戰。
cues.tr: Sometimes clients' problems are very complicated and it takes time to solve them, but I like this challenge.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那就好，像我就沒什麼耐心。你以前學過電腦嗎？
cues.tr: That's good, I'm not very patient. Have you studied computer science before?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是的，我大學學的是電腦科學，這份工作跟我的專業很有關係。
cues.tr: Yes, I studied computer science in college, and this job is very related to my major.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那你對這份工作滿意嗎？
cues.tr: Are you satisfied with this job?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還不錯，工作內容挺有趣的，而且我也學到了很多新東西。
cues.tr: Not bad, the work is quite interesting and I have learned a lot of new things.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你平時的工作時間怎麼樣？忙嗎？
cues.tr: How are your working hours? Are you busy?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還好，通常是朝九晚五，不過有時候要加班。
cues.tr: Not bad, usually from nine to five, but sometimes I have to work overtime.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 聽起來很不錯，加班多嗎？
cues.tr: Sounds good. Do you work a lot of overtime?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 不算太多，一般一週一次左右吧。
cues.tr: Not too much, usually about once a week.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那也還好，以後有機會升職嗎？
cues.tr: That's not bad. Will there be a chance of promotion in the future?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 應該有的，公司每年都有一次考核，表現好的人有機會升職。
cues.tr: Yes, there should be. The company has a yearly assessment, and those with good performance will have a chance to be promoted.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你覺得未來幾年會一直做這份工作嗎？
cues.tr: Do you think you'll be doing this job for the next few years?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我想會的，這份工作很符合我的興趣，再說只要有學習和發展的機會，我就會繼續做下去。
cues.tr: I think so. This job is very much in line with my interests, and as long as there are opportunities for learning and development, I will continue to do it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 真不錯！那你的朋友是怎麼幫你介紹這份工作的？
cues.tr: That's great! How did your friend introduce you to this job?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 他認識公司的人，所以幫我推薦了這個工作機會。
cues.tr: He knows people in the company, so he recommended this job opportunity to me.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你真幸運，有這樣的朋友幫忙！
cues.tr: You are lucky to have such a friend to help you!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，我也很感謝他幫我找到了這份合適的工作。
cues.tr: Yes, I'm also very grateful to him for helping me find this suitable job.
cues.speaker: B
